items.title: Any Plans for a macOS Version?
items.summary:
I’m really enjoying the game, and I was wondering if there are any plans for a macOS version in the future. I already know how to install and run it through workarounds, and that’s what I’m currently doing.

I’ve noticed that some games developed exclusively for iPhone and iPad can still be installed and run on Macs, but it seems that this game isn’t available that way. Is there a particular reason for that?
items.author: Nihil___

items.title: No sound?
items.summary: I have sound when I initially open the game but after I download resources all sound goes away. I already tried the fix button and I get the same issue.
items.author: Actic-Slash
